findings.title: Authentication Weaknesses Detected
findings.description: High-risk keywords related to authentication have been detected, indicating potential weaknesses in the authentication flow that could lead to unauthorized access.
assumptions: Authentication mechanisms are critical for user data protection.

evidence.excerpt: Detected auth risk keywords in 3 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a thorough security review of the authentication flow.

metadata.mitigation: Implement stronger authentication mechanisms and conduct a security audit.

findings.title: Checkout API Latency Exceeds Limits
findings.description: The current checkout API latency exceeds the service level objective, which could degrade user experience and affect conversion rates.
assumptions: High latency can lead to user frustration and abandonment.

evidence.excerpt: Optimize the checkout API to reduce p95 latency from 1200ms to below 500ms

recommendations: Optimize the checkout API to meet latency objectives.

metadata.mitigation: Address API latency issues before implementing new features.

findings.title: Payment Retry Reliability Issues
findings.description: Issues with payment retries are causing silent failures and double charges, which could severely impact user trust and system reliability.
assumptions: Reliable payment processing is essential for user trust.

evidence.excerpt: Resolve issues with payment retries that are failing silently

recommendations: Fix payment retry reliability issues before introducing new features.

metadata.mitigation: Resolve payment retry issues to ensure reliable transactions.

findings.title: Checkout Crashes on Mobile Devices
findings.description: The checkout process is crashing on mobile devices, which poses a significant risk to user experience and conversion rates.
assumptions: Mobile stability is crucial for user retention.

evidence.excerpt: The checkout crashing issue on mobile devices poses a significant risk

recommendations: Address mobile checkout crashes before launching new features.

metadata.mitigation: Fix mobile checkout crashes to ensure a stable user experience.

findings.title: Accessibility Compliance Gaps
findings.description: Accessibility risk keywords have been detected, indicating potential non-compliance with WCAG AA standards.

evidence.excerpt: Detected accessibility risk keywords in 1 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct an accessibility audit to ensure compliance with WCAG AA.

metadata.mitigation: Implement necessary changes to meet WCAG AA standards.
metadata.policy_rule: Accessibility is a requirement, not an afterthought.

findings.title: Compliance Risk with PII Handling
findings.description: Potential compliance risks related to PII handling have been flagged, necessitating a legal review.
assumptions: Compliance with data protection regulations is mandatory.

evidence.excerpt: Detected compliance risk keywords in 1 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a legal review of PII handling practices.

metadata.mitigation: Review PII handling to ensure compliance with regulations.

summary: Identified 6 risks (1 accessibility, 1 compliance, 1 mobile, 1 performance, 1 reliability, 1 security). 4 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (4 blockers, 0 warnings).
